message:
fix(engine): widen intermediate product to i128 in demo claim linkage rate calculation

Prevent i64 overflow in linked_claims_rate_millionths() when
linked_claims is large, using the same i128 widening pattern
applied to interleaving_explorer and translation_validation_receipt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
